title: Topics
description: A topic the reader follows, mutes, and weights — the personalization dial that tunes which articles surface in the feed and digests.

slug.description: the topic tag this row governs; matches an entry in articles.tags — dedupe key

label.description: human-friendly label shown in the Topics page

followed.description: whether the reader follows this topic (surfaced in Discover)

muted.description: whether the reader muted this topic (suppressed from the feed)

weight.description: personalization multiplier the personalizer tunes; higher = surfaced more often

articleCount.description: denormalized count of feed articles filed under this topic, refreshed by the curator

createdAt.description: when the reader first followed this topic

digestItems.description: digest slots filed under this topic
